name: INTEL CORP
summary: Intel Corporation is a technology company that designs and manufactures semiconductor products including microprocessors, chipsets, and related computing components. Intel serves data center, cloud, PC, mobile, and embedded markets. The company operates as both a chip designer and manufacturer (IDM model), offering products under segments including client computing and data center solutions.
